# Performance PR Template

- Milestone: <milestone_name_or_link> (optional)

## Changes

<!-- What was the performance problem? Where was it observed? -->

| Metric | Before | After |
|---|---|---|

## Testing

- [ ] Performance improvement verified via:
  - [ ] Benchmark / profiler
  - [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] No regressions introduced
- [ ] Existing tests pass

## Risk

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Notes: <potential side effects or tradeoffs>

## Checklist

- [ ] Lint/format pass
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] Docs updated if applicable
